name: 3oz Mo Ceramic Espresso Cup Black - Threshold™
description:
Whether it's time for black tea, coffee or any other drink, enjoy it in elegant style with the 3-Ounce Mo Ceramic Espresso Cup from Threshold™. This black espresso cup features a broad ribbed design for textured appeal you'll love. Suitable for hot or cold beverages, this ceramic cup is both microwave and dishwasher safe for quick reheating and cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
